hooks.command: sh -lc 'case "$(printf %s "$FURL_PRETOOL_PIPE" | tr "[:upper:]" "[:lower:]" | tr -d "[:space:]")" in 0|false|off|no|disabled) ;; *) uv run --no-project --with "furl-ctx[mcp]==1.2.0" python3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/pretool_pipe.py" ;; esac; true'

sh -c '[ "$FURL_STATUS_LINE" = "0" ] || printf "%s" "{\"systemMessage\": \"furl 1.3.0 · engine furl-ctx 1.2.0 — PreToolUse pipe active (FURL_PRETOOL_PIPE=0 to disable); PostToolUse compression armed; store: per-project (~/.furl); verify: furl_stats\"}"; true'
